The difference isn’t AI.
It’s how you use it.

Some scale noise.
Some scale results.

Which side are you on?

#funnelslayer

Quick reality check for anyone running paid traffic:

If your landing page has never been tested head to head
you don’t have a funnel
you have a guess.

Most teams don’t test
they redesign
debate
ship changes
and hope something sticks.

Then conversions drop
and no one knows why.

Because nothing wa
funnelslayer.hook: Quick reality check for anyone running paid traffic:

funnelslayer.caption:
Most funnels speak to one type of buyer and assume everyone else thinks the same way.

They don’t.

The Process Communication Model shows there are six personality types, and each one responds to a completely different trigger:

Thinker → logic and structure
Harmonizer → trust and connection
Rebel →
funnelslayer.hook: Most funnels speak to one type of buyer and assume everyone else thinks the same way

funnelslayer.caption:
your offer isn’t weak. your audience is wrong.

most people fix the copy when the real problem is who they’re talking to.

warm audience language ≠ cold audience language. they need completely different things.

#salesfunnel #funnelslayer #marketing #landingpage

Most landing pages explain everything in the first 5 seconds.

The problem.
The promise.
The proof.

So the brain feels like it already “gets it”… and leaves.

Sometimes the missing piece on your landing page isn’t a better copy.

It’s curiosity.

A lot of high-converting webinar pages barely explai
funnelslayer.hook: Most landing pages explain everything in the first 5 seconds

funnelslayer.caption:
Most people think low sales from their funnel means they need more traffic.

So they increase the ad budget.

More clicks. More visitors.

But nothing really changes.

Because the real problem usually isn’t traffic.

It’s that the funnel makes the decision hard.

When someone lands on your page they

funnelslayer.caption:
Everyone’s using AI.
That’s not the advantage anymore.

The gap is in who’s actually thinking.

AI can scale output.
It can’t create taste, judgment, or a point of view.

#salesfunnel #b2b #marketing #funnelslayer #marketingtips

Most marketers launch campaigns emotionally.

Good mood → launch.
Bad week → rewrite everything.
Random idea → new funnel.

Elite teams don’t operate like that.

They run protocols.

Same preparation.
Same mental state.
Same execution.

Consistency in results comes from consistency in inputs.

Your

Most copy sounds good.
Very little of it converts.

Here’s a simple filter for everything you write
ads, landing pages, emails, VSLs, posts:

Every sentence should pass 3 tests:

Can you picture it?
Can you prove it wrong?
Could anyone else say it?

If the answers aren’t:
Yes. No. No.
Rewrite it.

V

Most ads fail because they don’t pass this test.

To write high-converting ads, landing pages, emails, or VSLs,
every sentence must answer YES / NO / NO:

Can you picture it? Yes
Can you prove it wrong? No
Could anyone else say it? No

Bad ad:
“We deliver amazing results.”

Better ad:
“47 booked cal
funnelslayer.hook: Most ads fail because they don’t pass this test

funnelslayer.caption:
Ads used to speak to one audience.

Humans.

Now there are two watching the same ad.

The person… and the algorithm.

The scene, objects, background, even the vibe of the video send signals that decide who your ad gets shown to.

So every frame has two jobs now:
Connect with a human.
Guide the algor
funnelslayer.hook: Ads used to speak to one audience
